best_mounts_ground.name: Hartalis
best_mounts_ground.note: Fastest ground mount in 1.0 with a triple jump for scaling terrain; unlocked via raid-boss summon.

best_mounts_ground.name: Necromus
best_mounts_ground.note: Legendary; among the highest sprint speeds plus a dash skill — the classic endgame ground king.

best_mounts_ground.name: Paladius
best_mounts_ground.note: Legendary counterpart to Necromus; dash plus high triple-jump, tankier ride.

best_mounts_ground.name: Fenglope
best_mounts_ground.note: Best speed-to-effort ratio: double jump, low-gravity float, easy mid-game capture.

best_mounts_ground.name: Ophydia
best_mounts_ground.note: S-tier ground mount on palworld.gg that doubles as a top-tier swimmer — best amphibious option.

best_mounts_ground.name: Azurmane
best_mounts_ground.note: New 1.0 Electric steed; S-tier ground speed on palworld.gg.

best_mounts_ground.name: Dazemu
best_mounts_ground.note: Fast mid-game runner; S-tier on palworld.gg ground list.

best_mounts_ground.name: Starryon
best_mounts_ground.note: S-tier 1.0 ground mount (Primo variant equally rated).

best_mounts_ground.name: Pyrin
best_mounts_ground.note: Accessible fire mount with S-tier ground rating; great mid-game pick.

best_mounts_ground.name: Direhowl
best_mounts_ground.note: Earliest saddle in the game yet still one of the faster ground mounts — best early option.

best_mounts_flying.name: Jetragon
best_mounts_flying.note: Fastest Pal in the game (~3300 ride sprint) — more than double the next flyer; low stamina, best for short hops.

best_mounts_flying.name: Xenolord
best_mounts_flying.note: ~2700 sprint with a far bigger stamina pool than Jetragon — the long-haul flyer (palworld.gg rates its handling lower).

best_mounts_flying.name: Panthalus
best_mounts_flying.note: New 1.0 legendary; S-tier flying mount on palworld.gg.

best_mounts_flying.name: Shaolong
best_mounts_flying.note: S-tier 1.0 flyer on palworld.gg; also the best Watering worker.

best_mounts_flying.name: Eidrolon
best_mounts_flying.note: S-tier flyer on palworld.gg (Ignis variant equally rated).

best_mounts_flying.name: Frostallion
best_mounts_flying.note: ~1800 sprint; best legendary flyer that is also a top combat pal (Noct variant same speed, Dark attacks).

best_mounts_flying.name: Selyne
best_mounts_flying.note: A-tier flyer on palworld.gg that doubles as an elite Handiwork/Medicine base worker.

best_mounts_flying.name: Shadowbeak
best_mounts_flying.note: ~1600 sprint; best combat flier outside the legendaries.

best_mounts_flying.name: Faleris
best_mounts_flying.note: ~1400 sprint; best pre-endgame progression flyer (Aqua variant similar).

best_mounts_flying.name: Nitewing
best_mounts_flying.note: First flying mount most players get; fine until Faleris.

best_mounts_swim.name: Neptilius
best_mounts_swim.note: Best swimmer in 1.0: highest sprint speed and largest stamina pool, plus a huge water leap; level ~60 Alpha.

best_mounts_swim.name: Ophydia
best_mounts_swim.note: Second-fastest swimmer; highest tech unlock, inflicts Soak, also an S-tier ground mount.

best_mounts_swim.name: Jormuntide
best_mounts_swim.note: Long-standing water speed king; near-top speed with damage-synergy partner skill.

best_mounts_swim.name: Ghangler
best_mounts_swim.note: Underrated early-ish swim mount with big stamina; fishing bite-speed partner skill (Ignis variant similar).

best_mounts_swim.name: Solmora
best_mounts_swim.note: Fast swimmer and fishing specialist for landing high-stat catches.

best_mounts_swim.name: Surfent
best_mounts_swim.note: Earliest swim saddle (low tech level); good speed for its unlock point.

best_mounts_swim.name: Azurobe
best_mounts_swim.note: Best early-mid water mount; adds Water damage to your attacks while riding (Cryst variant gives Ice).

best_mounts_swim.name: Whalaska
best_mounts_swim.note: Slower cruiser but boosts the fishing catch gauge — pick if you fish a lot (Ignis variant similar).

best_fighters.name: Jetragon
best_fighters.note: «Эндгейм-стандарт»: топ-атака 140 + непревзойдённая мобильность; S во всех редакторских списках 1.0.

best_fighters.name: Necromus
best_fighters.note: ATK 145 — одна из высших; S у nexttier/gamerant/neonlights; топ наземный маунт.

best_fighters.name: Xenolord
best_fighters.note: Рейд-легендарка: подавляющая атака при крепкой защите; S повсеместно.

best_fighters.name: Frostallion
best_fighters.note: ATK 140, стандартный ответ драконам; Frostallion Noct — равноценная Dark-версия.

best_fighters.name: Frostallion Noct
best_fighters.note: Dark-версия: маунт со сменой атак игрока на Dark +10~40% и Blind.

best_fighters.name: Shadowbeak
best_fighters.note: S+ у gamerant, S у nexttier/neonlights.

best_fighters.name: Bellanoir Libero
best_fighters.note: S+ у gamerant, S у neonlights; рейд-эксклюзив.

best_fighters.name: Blazamut Ryu
best_fighters.note: ATK 150 (топ среди не-легендарок) + аура Dragon weak-point +25~40%.

best_fighters.name: Neptilius
best_fighters.note: Лучшая атака среди Water (145) с бурстом; S у oslink; самый быстрый пловец.

best_fighters.name: Astralym
best_fighters.note: 1.0 World Tree легендарка (200/200/200) — статы вне категорий; финальный босс, ловля после квеста.

best_fighters.name: Anubis
best_fighters.note: ATK 130; S у neonlights; активируемый бафф игрока Ground +30~50%.

best_fighters.name: Orserk
best_fighters.note: S у oslink/neonlights; чаще ценится за пулевой стак-бафф активному палу.

best_fighters.name: Hartalis
best_fighters.note: S у oslink; топ-1 наземный маунт.

best_for_fishing.name: Whalaska
best_for_fishing.note: Catch meter starts partly filled and fills faster while fishing (Whalaska Ignis has the improved version).

best_for_fishing.name: Ghangler
best_for_fishing.note: Pals/fish bite faster while Ghangler is active; also a good swim mount (Ignis variant triggers for Fire/Water).

best_for_fishing.name: Gloopie
best_for_fishing.note: Slows gauge drain when the bar is off the fish; at 4-star condense it trivializes even Master fishing spots.

best_for_fishing.name: Jelliette
best_for_fishing.note: More items gained through fishing — the loot-quantity pick.

best_for_fishing.name: Jellroy
best_for_fishing.note: More and better loot from salvage actions while fishing.

best_for_fishing.name: Solmora
best_for_fishing.note: Fishing-specialist swim mount geared toward catching high-stat pals.

kindling.name: Renjishi
kindling.note: Kindling Lv 8 — highest wild kindling in 1.0; also Handiwork 6 and Transporting 5.

kindling.name: Jormuntide Ignis
kindling.note: Kindling Lv 7 pure specialist; never wanders to other jobs.

kindling.name: Flaracle
kindling.note: Kindling Lv 7 with Handiwork 6 — great dual-role furnace pal.

kindling.name: Dupin
kindling.note: Kindling Lv 7 plus Handiwork 5 and Medicine 4.

kindling.name: Blazamut Ryu
kindling.note: Kindling Lv 6 and Mining 7 — furnace-and-ore combo.

kindling.name: Eidrolon Ignis
kindling.note: Kindling Lv 6 with Transporting 6 — feeds its own furnaces.

watering.name: Shaolong
watering.note: Watering Lv 8 — the 1.0 watering king; adds Gathering 5.

watering.name: Neptilius
watering.note: Watering Lv 7 on a legendary chassis.

watering.name: Jormuntide
watering.note: Watering Lv 7 pure specialist, easy late-game catch.

watering.name: Faleris Aqua
watering.note: Watering Lv 6 plus Transporting 5 — waters crops and hauls them.

watering.name: Ophydia
watering.note: Watering Lv 5 with Planting 7 — one-pal plantation.

planting.name: Dandilord
planting.note: Planting Lv 8 — best in 1.0; also Handiwork 6, Medicine 6, Gathering 5.

planting.name: Ophydia
planting.note: Planting Lv 7 with Watering 5 — covers two farm jobs.

planting.name: Lyleen
planting.note: Planting Lv 7 plus Gathering 6 and Handiwork 5.

planting.name: Silvance
planting.note: Planting Lv 6 on the best Medicine pal (8).

generating_electricity.name: Orserk
generating_electricity.note: Electricity Lv 8 — clear best generator in 1.0; also Transporting 4.

generating_electricity.name: Grizzbolt
generating_electricity.note: Electricity Lv 5 with Handiwork 4 and Transporting 5 — classic all-rounder.

generating_electricity.name: Azurmane
generating_electricity.note: Electricity Lv 5 and doubles as an S-tier ground mount.

handiwork.name: Solenne
handiwork.note: Handiwork Lv 8 — best pure crafter in 1.0; Gathering 4.

handiwork.name: Selyne
handiwork.note: Handiwork Lv 7 with Medicine 6 and Transporting 3 — strongest multi-role crafter.

handiwork.name: Venusa
handiwork.note: Handiwork Lv 6 with Gathering 6 and Medicine 5.

handiwork.name: Anubis
handiwork.note: Handiwork Lv 6 plus Mining 6 — breedable far earlier than the Lv-7+ options.

handiwork.name: Renjishi
handiwork.note: Handiwork Lv 6 on the best Kindling pal.

gathering.name: Jetragon
gathering.note: Gathering Lv 8 — surprisingly the best gatherer in 1.0.

gathering.name: Lyleen
gathering.note: Gathering Lv 6 with Planting 7 (Lyleen Noct also Gathering 6).

lumbering.name: Celesdir Noct
lumbering.note: Lumbering Lv 8 — best logger in 1.0 (base Celesdir is Lv 7).

lumbering.name: Celesdir
lumbering.note: Lumbering Lv 7, easier to obtain than the Noct form.

lumbering.name: Bastigor
lumbering.note: Lumbering Lv 6 on the best Cooling pal (8).

lumbering.name: Paladius
lumbering.note: Lumbering Lv 6 (Necromus matches it) — legendary side job.

mining.name: Knocklem
mining.note: Mining Lv 7 with Transporting 7 — mines and hauls (Ignis variant identical plus Kindling 5).

mining.name: Blazamut
mining.note: Mining Lv 7 with Kindling 6 — classic ore-and-furnace pal (Ryu variant same).

mining.name: Anubis
mining.note: Mining Lv 6 plus Handiwork 6; breedable mid-game.

mining.name: Dualith
mining.note: Mining Lv 6 with Transporting 6 (Noct variant identical).

medicine.name: Silvance
medicine.note: Medicine Lv 8 — best pharmacist in 1.0; also Planting 6 and Handiwork 6.

medicine.name: Lyleen Noct
medicine.note: Medicine Lv 7 with Gathering 6 and Handiwork 5.

medicine.name: Selyne
medicine.note: Medicine Lv 6 on the second-best Handiwork pal.

cooling.name: Bastigor
cooling.note: Cooling Lv 8 — best cooler in 1.0; also Mining 5 and Lumbering 6.

cooling.name: Reptyro Cryst
cooling.note: Cooling Lv 5 with Mining 5 — classic fridge-plus-quarry pal.

transporting.name: Knocklem
transporting.note: Transporting Lv 7 with Mining 7 — best hauler in 1.0 (Ignis variant identical).

transporting.name: Wumpo Botan
transporting.note: Transporting Lv 6 with Planting/Handiwork 3 (base Wumpo also 6, with Cooling 5).

transporting.name: Dualith
transporting.note: Transporting Lv 6 with Mining 6 (Noct variant identical).

transporting.name: Grizzbolt
transporting.note: Transporting Lv 5 with Electricity 5 and Handiwork 4.

transporting.name: Faleris Aqua
transporting.note: Transporting Lv 5 on the second-best Watering pal.

farming.name: Sibelyx Primo
farming.note: Farming Lv 4 — highest ranch level in 1.0 wild data.

farming.name: Dumud Gild
farming.note: Farming Lv 4 — new 1.0 gilded variant, top-level rancher.

farming.name: Sibelyx
farming.note: Farming Lv 3; produces High Quality Cloth.

farming.name: Beegarde
farming.note: Farming Lv 3; honey producer for cake/breeding pipelines.

farming.name: Chikipi
farming.note: Farming Lv 1; eggs — kept for cake ingredients despite the low level.

notes: All placements are from sources updated for the 1.0 release (July 2026); no pre-1.0-only list was used for rankings.
Work levels in notes are wild base values from data/palworld_pals.csv (1.0 scale, wild max 8); sources state suitability can be pushed to 10 via breeding and Pal condensing.

Every base-worker pick was cross-checked against the CSV work columns; palworld.gg's displayed levels matched the CSV everywhere checked (Renjishi Kindling 8, Shaolong Watering 8, Orserk Electricity 8, Solenne Handiwork 8, Aegidron Mining 8, Silvance Medicine 8, Bastigor Cooling 8, Jetragon Gathering 8, Knocklem Transporting 7).
pindrop.gg's tier list was fetched but SKIPPED: it still uses pre-1.0 roster/names (e.g. 'Dragostrophe' and 'Ice Kingpaca', which are not in the 1.0 pal list) and covers only 172 pals.

game8.co pages (best mounts 440495, best base pals 440432, combat 440279) and mobalytics.gg were bot-blocked (AWS WAF / Cloudflare challenge) and could not be read; rankings lean on palworld.gg plus the other sources below instead.
Normalized source typos to CSV canonical names: 'Paldius' -> Paladius, 'Neptilus' -> Neptilius (thebiglead.com).
Swimming speed figures differ between sources (nexttier vs palworldzone); the palworldzone 1.0 tier ordering was used, with Ophydia vs Jormuntide order per its tier placement.
Farming = ranch production; it caps at Lv 4 in 1.0 wild data, and the produced item matters more than the level (e.g. Beegarde honey, Mozzarina milk, Chikipi eggs for cakes).
Fishing is a 1.0/0.6+ feature; the fishing list is based on partner-skill effects, not a formal tier list.

sources.what: 1.0 combat tier list (S-D tiers) — basis for best_fighters ordering
1.0 worker tier list with per-pal work levels — cross-check for base workers
1.0 mount speeds and rankings for flying/ground/swim (Jetragon ~3300, Xenolord ~2700, Hartalis top ground)
1.0 fastest mounts corroboration (Hartalis ground, Neptilius swim, Jetragon/Xenolord air)
1.0 swimming mount tier list with speeds/stamina/saddle levels — basis for best_mounts_swim
1.0 (July 2026) combat S/A tiers with per-pal justifications (Jormuntide Ignis, Neptilius, Blazamut Ryu notes)
1.0 fishing guide — fishing partner skills for Whalaska, Ghangler, Jellroy, Jelliette
Gloopie fishing-gauge note (via search summary; page itself bot-blocked)
canonical pal names and 1.0 work-suitability levels (299 pals)

sources.url: oslink.io / nexttier.pro / gamerant.com / neonlightsmedia.com / game8.co (1.0 combat tier lists)
sources.what: best_fighters переупорядочен по консенсусу редакторских списков 1.0; Panthalus исключён (0 упоминаний как атакер: гайды в один голос — летающий маунт + ПВО базы; формула урона игры множит только Attack, его 120 — низ класса при аномальном bulk 180/200)
